project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: Push Notification History (title, message, image URLs)
project_privacy_data_flows.description: The app stores received push notification content (title, message, image URLs) in a local Room database (notification table). The Notification History screen reads and displays this stored notification data for user review.

flow_steps.details: User opens the Notification History screen. The app queries all stored notification records from the local Room database.
Previously, when push notifications were received via FCM, the notification content (title, message, image URLs, tag) was stored in the local Room database notification table for later viewing.

project_privacy_data_flows.description: The Notification Settings screen reads and manages Android notification channels for the app. It reads channel configurations from the system NotificationManager and allows creating/deleting channels.

flow_steps.details: User opens Notification Settings. The app reads notification channel configurations from the system NotificationManager.
